title: MRD Resistance Geometry Axis Revision v0

revision_result.summary: The v0 geometry is revised from a single radial map into a flexible four-axis structure: measurement trajectory, residual biological state, clone architecture, and provisional clone-state coupling edges. Microenvironment, therapy pressure, disease context, and translation-readiness remain support layers.

revised_axes.axis_role: Track source-defined MRD and response dynamics without interpreting an individual result.
allowed_movement: Split by assay method when MRD measurement methods are not comparable.
Split by specimen, threshold, sensitivity context, or timepoint when source context differs.
Move single-cell resolution into translation-readiness context rather than clinical readiness.

revised_axes.axis_role: Track source-defined residual malignant plasma-cell states and pathway-state observations without actionability.
allowed_movement: Split residual state by therapy exposure, sampling time, or source-defined response context.
Keep metabolic and NF-kB pathway states as under-covered branches until second-source extraction is complete.
Fold pathway labels into residual-state context if contradiction mining shows that separate branches overstate support.
blocked_inferences: No supplement or metabolic intervention suggestion.
No routine clinical single-cell decision support claim.

revised_axes.axis_role: Track clone identity, clone architecture, subclone diversity, and source-defined clone-inference context without prognosis.
allowed_movement: Split by clone-inference method when methods differ.
Keep review-level subclone diversity separate from cohort-level clone measurements.
Move clone labels only when source-defined clone identity and sample timing are preserved.

revised_axes.axis_role: Link clone architecture to residual biological state while preserving clone and state as separate fields.
allowed_movement: Split into clone-inference and transcriptional-state subedges if contradiction mining weakens a unified edge.
Route any causal-sounding language to the contradiction-mining queue before reuse.

support_layers.role: Keep marrow interaction context visible without treating cell-interaction inference as a patient-specific mechanism.
Represent immune-redirection and target-class context without sequencing advice.
Preserve high-unmet-need contexts as interpretation modifiers, not patient-specific risk calls.
Separate research resolution from clinical readiness.

revised_edges.rule: Compare only when assay, specimen, threshold or sensitivity context, sample timing, cohort, and response context are visible.
Keep clone identity and transcriptional state separate; do not convert correlation into causality.
Metabolic and NF-kB branches remain descriptive research branches until second-source extraction matures them.
Support layers can change interpretation needs, but they cannot rank mechanisms or create clinical recommendations.

movement_rules: New public source extraction may move a node from under-covered to covered-for-v0-navigation only as artifact coverage.
Contradiction mining may split or weaken an edge before any claim upgrade.
Measurement trajectory can move independently from residual biological state.
Residual biological state can branch by pathway, therapy exposure, or source-defined cell state.
Clone architecture can branch by clone-inference method and subclone context.
No movement rule can create clinical guidance, patient-specific interpretation, mechanism ranking, or cure language.
completed_gate_checks: At least three high-priority buckets have two public extraction records.
Every comparison axis cites source IDs and extraction record IDs.
Internal adversarial audit results are recorded.
Contradiction mining is routed to a no-human-outreach task queue.
No cure, prognosis, diagnosis, treatment, monitoring, trial, or patient-specific guidance is introduced.
remaining_open_work: Run contradiction-mining tasks before any claim upgrade.
Add second-source extraction for metabolic resistance state.
Add second-source extraction for NF-kB selective state.
Add second-source extraction for therapy pressure, high-risk context, subclone diversity, and single-cell translation gaps.

review_notes: Created after mrd-resistance-geometry-intelligence-audit-results-v0 passed all six audit items for research-map continuation only.
This revision implements the four-axis structure promised by the Phase 2 decision.
This revision does not upgrade any claim and does not create clinical guidance.
